label: frontier • find the needle with search, not a 30-file read walk
query: Exactly one file under notes/ contains the string 'magic-token-z9x'. Find which file it is and write that file's name (just the filename) to found.txt.
notes: file_search discipline: 30 candidate files make a read-everything walk blow the maxToolCalls cap, so only a search-first strategy passes.
